name: Joint density of states (vertical interband transitions)
conventions: sum over conduction (c) and valence (v) bands
expectedLimits: onset at fundamental gap for semiconductors (J(omega < E_g) = 0)
high-omega: square-root or parabolic depending on band-edge shape
references: Yu & Cardona, Fundamentals of Semiconductors, ch.6
Bassani & Pastori-Parravicini, Electronic States and Optical Transitions in Solids, 1975
